name: @forgeax/video-texture
description: feat-20260623-world-space-video-asset M5 convergence app — world-space video texture demo: host provides HTMLVideoElement, engine uploads frames to GPU as transient textures sampled by MaterialAsset paramValues (shares texture2d slot with static textures). AC-07 browser e2e pixel readback carrier.

forgeax._comment: smokeInvocation = video-texture SSOT for AC-07 world-space-video-renders / video-frame-advances (feat-20260623-world-space-video-asset M5). dawn structural-only (no HTMLVideoElement); browser e2e runs smoke:browser.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle size is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime + @forgeax/engine-ecs sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: video-texture is an AC-07 world-space-video-renders / video-frame-advances proof carrier; FPS benchmarks belong to the engine-runtime package

bench.reason: bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math + @forgeax/engine-ecs; video-texture validates rendering correctness, not throughput

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; world-space video is a production feature proof
